rooms.name: Bunkroom
rooms.description: Hard pallets, a shared brazier, four bunks. Where the unattached sleep.

rooms.name: Hero Bedroom
rooms.description: A private cell with a real bed. Officers and named heroes get their own.

rooms.name: Storeroom
rooms.description: Damp stone, iron rings, a locked door. Holds one captive securely.

rooms.name: Scouting Post
rooms.description: A lean-to with maps, runners, a tally board. Word of work reaches here.

rooms.name: Tavern
rooms.description: Cheap beer, hot stew, a fire. Drifters drift in. So do recruits.

rooms.name: Garrison Smithy
rooms.description: A working forge for arms and armour. Mercs leave better kitted than they arrive.

rooms.name: Wayside Chapel
rooms.description: A small stone chapel for the dead. The living sleep a little easier.

rooms.name: Stone Watch Tower
rooms.description: A four-storey tower with crow's-nest sightlines. Few surprises reach the gate.

rooms.name: Granary
rooms.description: A stone granary and root cellar. The fort can feed itself; mercs ask 1g less per payday.

rooms.name: Workshop
rooms.description: Sawn benches, vices, a slow lathe. Where things get fixed and made.

rooms.name: Deep Storeroom
rooms.description: A second cell, deeper in the stone. Two more rings, two more captives.

rooms.name: Oubliette
rooms.description: A pit you forget people in. Three more rings around three more throats.

rooms.name: Trophy Hall
rooms.description: Banners, broken blades, the helms of the named dead. Strangers slow down to look.

rooms.name: Throne Room
rooms.description: A seat carved from one stone. The fort has a center of gravity now.
